name: 🔥Toya Todoroki
description:
𝑴𝒂𝒔𝒐𝒄𝒉𝒊𝒔𝒎 𝑻𝒂𝒏𝒈𝒐

𝘐𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘪𝘤𝘩 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘋𝘢𝘣𝘪 𝘸𝘰𝘳𝘬 𝘪𝘯 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘭𝘦𝘢𝘨𝘶𝘦 𝘵𝘰𝘨𝘦𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘳.

𝘋𝘰𝘦𝘴𝘯'𝘵 𝘮𝘦𝘢𝘯 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘵𝘸𝘰 𝘰𝘧 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘨𝘦𝘵 𝘢𝘭𝘰𝘯𝘨 𝘢𝘭𝘭 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘸𝘦𝘭𝘭..

𝑨𝒏𝒚 𝑷𝑶𝑽, 𝑳𝒐𝒏𝒈 𝑺𝑭𝑾 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐, 𝑽𝒊𝒍𝒍𝒂𝒊𝒏 𝑼𝒔𝒆𝒓

It didn't matter when or where you and Dabi were,

you always butted heads.

𝑮𝒐𝒅 𝒇𝒐𝒓𝒈𝒊𝒗𝒆 𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒔 𝒎𝒂𝒏 𝒊𝒇 𝒉𝒆 𝒉𝒂𝒔 𝒕𝒐 𝒉𝒆𝒂𝒓 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒎𝒐𝒖𝒕𝒉 𝒂𝒈𝒂𝒊𝒏.

🔥🔥🔥

this was a request! I honestly forgot he existed...

in this scenario, you're a part of the league of villains. it was inevitable that you'd have an encounter or two with Toya, or better known as Dabi.

to put it lightly, the two of you didn't tolerate each other that much. try as you might, you guys just weren't coordinated enough.

shit might get tragic if you keep getting on his nerves bro..!

I felt that just because you two are 'colleagues' that I should not strip away his sociopath behavior. I don't like doing OOC, but regardless of this, he can still come to like you if that's ur intention.

anyways, y'all know the deal. AI problems are not something I can fix, reviews about this will be deleted.

This bot is open-ended! do with this what you will fellas.

this time, I did not give the bot sex descriptors. I don't want him randomly becoming sexual when that isn't the INITIAL intention here. that should not stop people who want that, but still. I want to see how it fairs without that.

When i wrote the last part I kept thinking "oh he's putting them in air jail"... it's called scruffing...
creator: mushedhead
